message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first SnapshotEngine.capture in restart + snapshot save (tick 273)

Migrates 2 ambient `SnapshotEngine::capture` call sites in main.rs to
the cx-first sibling `capture_with_cx`:

- L9057 `ft restart` pre-shutdown capture:
  `snapshot_engine.capture_with_cx(&snapshot_cx, &panes, SnapshotTrigger::Shutdown)`
  inside the closure passed to `execute_restart_post_preflight`.
- L38628 `ft snapshot save` manual capture:
  `engine.capture_with_cx(&snap_save_cx, &panes, snap_trigger)`

Both sites resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
at the call site. The `capture_with_cx` variant (snapshot_engine.rs
L515) routes through cx-aware storage writes for the checkpoint record,
pane scrollback dump, and session persistence metadata. A cx-cancel
during `ft restart` or `ft snapshot save` now cleanly aborts the
snapshot mid-capture rather than writing a partial checkpoint before
unwinding.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 87 (187-273).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 148 sites (146 before + 2).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
